# LLM Field Notes

> An open, local-first workspace for turning documents into an inspectable,
> evolving knowledge graph and projecting it into Obsidian-ready Markdown.

## Start here

- [Workbench](./#workbench): ingest documents, inspect concepts and relations,
  review evidence, and improve the representation.
- [Learning map](./#map): first-principles notes and runnable experiments about
  tokens, embeddings, attention, training, transformers, retrieval, agents,
  and production systems.
- [Try a sample graph](./#sample): launch the complete local workflow without
  preparing a document.

## Project contracts

- [Architecture](./ARCHITECTURE.md): module boundaries, graph source of truth,
  learning loop, privacy levels, and extension rules.
- [Graph schema](./schema/graph.schema.json): normalized internal
  representation.
- [Feedback schema](./schema/feedback.schema.json): reviewed decisions used as
  bounded extractor guidance.
- [Vault manifest schema](./schema/vault-manifest.schema.json): Obsidian
  projection identity and round-trip metadata.
- [Health schema](./schema/health.schema.json): privacy-safe graph quality
  diagnostics and automation gates.
- [JSON-LD schema](./schema/jsonld.schema.json): versioned semantic-web
  projection contract for external graph tooling.
- [Learning note pages](./notes/README.md): runnable curriculum notes with
  crawler-readable shared landing pages.

## Principles

- Preserve evidence and provenance with every inference.
- Make confidence, uncertainty, review freshness, and ambiguity visible.
- Let people correct the representation without starting over.
- Treat Obsidian and Markdown as projections, not competing databases.
- Keep local graph data private; shared URLs never contain the graph.

## Contribute

- [Contributing guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md): improve the curriculum, graph
  behavior, projections, or deployment surface.
- [Security guide](./SECURITY.md): data boundaries and vulnerability
  reporting.
- [Changelog](./CHANGELOG.md): production hardening and user-visible changes.
